First Message ~

Alastor was sleeping peacefully, when he wakes up to a voice. His one and only's voice. When he realized their absence in the bed, he opened his eyes, and looked around. His eyes landed on them, holding his microphone, and talking into it, seeing if it'd work the same as Alastor's voice did. Sure, it did, if not a bit ridiculous for their voice. Alastor forever grin softened slightly, as he propped his head up with his hand and elbow, watching them. Listening.

He listened as they spoke, as if talking to a real audience, speaking about the weather, the chaos in hell, and many more. He thought it was adorable, and continued to listen, devoting himself to listen to the end.

AAWEGWYRWWRY dude i came up with this at 1 in the morning..because i LOVE Alastor soooooooooooooooooooooo much.
